mapper.select:
select m.id, m.member_name, m.member_handle, m.member_bio, m.member_role, (select f.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select mm.member_nickname from tbl_follow fl2 join tbl_member mm on fl2.follower_id = mm.id where fl2.following_id = m.id and fl2.follower_id != #{memberId} limit 1) as follower_intro from tbl_member m where m.member_status = 'active' and m.id != #{memberId} and m.id not in (select fl.following_id from tbl_follow fl where fl.follower_id = #{memberId}) and m.id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{memberId})
order by m.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select count(*) from tbl_member m where m.member_status = 'active' and m.id != #{memberId} and m.id not in (select fl.following_id from tbl_follow fl where fl.follower_id = #{memberId}) and m.id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{memberId})

select m.id, m.member_name, m.member_handle, m.member_bio, m.member_role, (select fi.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file fi on mpf.id = fi.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_follow fl2 where fl2.follower_id = #{viewerId} and fl2.following_id = m.id) as is_following from tbl_follow f join tbl_member m on f.follower_id = m.id where f.following_id = #{profileId} and m.member_status = 'active' and m.id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{viewerId}) order by f.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select count(*) from tbl_follow f join tbl_member m on f.follower_id = m.id where f.following_id = #{profileId} and m.member_status = 'active' and m.id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{viewerId})

select m.id, m.member_name, m.member_handle, m.member_bio, m.member_role, (select fi.file_name from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file fi on mpf.id = fi.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_name, (select count(*) from tbl_follow fl2 where fl2.follower_id = #{viewerId} and fl2.following_id = m.id) as is_following from tbl_follow f join tbl_member m on f.following_id = m.id where f.follower_id = #{profileId} and m.member_status = 'active' and m.id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{viewerId}) order by f.created_datetime desc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}

select count(*) from tbl_follow f join tbl_member m on f.following_id = m.id where f.follower_id = #{profileId} and m.member_status = 'active' and m.id not in (select bl.blocked_id from tbl_block bl where bl.blocker_id = #{viewerId})
